compiled_state.title: RED tests: assert no v2 dual-path code in classify-task.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## TDD Requirement

Write failing tests (RED state) for classify-task.sh v2 removal. These tests must FAIL on the current codebase.

## Implementation Steps

1. Add new test functions to tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh:
   - test_classify_task_no_use_v3_detection: assert grep -q '_use_v3' plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh exits non-zero
   - test_classify_task_no_TICKETS_DIR_branch: assert grep -q '\.tickets/$id\.md' plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh exits non-zero
   - test_classify_task_no_tk_ready: assert grep -q 'tk ready' plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh exits non-zero
   - test_classify_task_no_tk_show: assert grep -q 'tk show' plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh exits non-zero

2. Verify each test fails on the current codebase (RED state).

## Test File Notes
- Existing test file: tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh
- Source: classify-task.sh → fuzzy match: classifytasksh
- Test: test-classify-task.sh → fuzzy: testclassifytasksh — 'classifytask' is substring. Fuzzy match OK, no .test-index needed.

## Files Modified
- tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh (Edit — add test functions at end of file)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_classify_task_no_use_v3_detection function exists in test-classify-task.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_classify_task_no_use_v3_detection' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh
- [ ] test_classify_task_no_tk_ready function exists in test-classify-task.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_classify_task_no_tk_ready' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh
- [ ] Tests FAIL on current codebase (RED state — _use_v3 still present)
  Verify: { bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — existing tests still pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — 4 new RED tests fail on current codebase (_use_v3, .tickets/$id.md, tk ready, tk show all still present). 12 existing tests pass.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All ACs verified. 4 RED tests added using portable { grep -q ...; test $? -ne 0; } negation. No .test-index changes needed (fuzzy match OK per ticket notes).
